summary: AtBat subscriber FGotD out-of-market - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN the user is an Audio Only subscriber
AND the FGotD is scheduled/in-progress
AND the FGotD is not in the subscribers viewing market

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN a Feed Select modal displays
AND the user is able to select both feeds in the Feed Select modal
AND both team video feeds play successfully
